metadata.name: nexus-cat
metadata.summary: Nexus is a Cluster Analysing Toolkit package for atomic systems.

functions.name: nexus.io.read_lattices_properties.read_lattices_properties
documentation:
Create the Box object for each frame in the trajectory file.

Parameters
----------
    - box (Box) : Box object to store the lattice properties.
    - file_path (str) : Path to the trajectory file containing the lattice properties.
    
Returns:
--------
    - None.

functions.name: nexus.io.read_number_of_configurations.count_configurations
documentation:
Count the number of configurations in the trajectory file.

Parameters
----------
    - file_path (str) : Path to the trajectory file.
    - keyword (str) : Keyword to search in the file. Default is "Lattice".
    
Returns:
--------
    - int : Number of frames found in the input file.

modules.name: nexus.io.read_and_create_system
documentation: external imports

functions.name: nexus.io.read_and_create_system.seek_to_line
documentation:
Seeks to the specified line number in the file.

Parameters:
-----------
    - file (file object): The file object.
    - line_number (int): The line number to seek to.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

functions.name: nexus.io.read_and_create_system.read_and_create_system
documentation:
Read the xyz file and return the frame as a System object.
- NOTE: this function is extension dependent.

Parameters
----------
- file_path (str) : Path to the xyz file.
- frame (int) : Frame number to read.
- frame_size (int) : Number of atoms in the frame + number of header lines.
- settings (Settings) : Settings object.
- cutoffs (dict) : Dictionary with the cutoffs for each pair of elements.
- start (int) : Id of the first frame to read.
- end (int) : Id of the last frame to read.
    
Returns:
--------
    - System : the system object created with the informations provided by the input file.

functions.name: nexus.io.write_list_of_files.write_list_of_files
documentation: Write a list of the all-in-one unwrapped clusters file to a text file.

functions.name: nexus.io.make_lines_unique.make_lines_unique
documentation:
Read an output file that contains multiple header lines and rewrite the file with unique lines.

Parameters
----------
    - filepath (str) : The path to the file to be read and rewritten. 
    
Returns
-------
    - None

modules.name: nexus.settings.settings
documentation: internal imports

classes.name: nexus.settings.settings.Settings

methods.name: nexus.settings.settings.Settings.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a Settings object with default settings.

Parameters:
-----------
    - extension (str): The extension of the project.

methods.name: nexus.settings.settings.Settings.load_default_settings
documentation:
Loads default settings based on the extension.

Parameters:
-----------
    - extension (str): The extension of the project.

methods.name: nexus.settings.settings.Settings.print_settings
documentation: Prints the current settings.

methods.name: nexus.settings.settings.Settings.print_all_settings
documentation: Prints all settings, including those not recommended for printing.

Represents the settings for a project.

Attributes:
----------
    - project_name (Parameter): Name of the project used for the output directory.
    - export_directory (Parameter): Parent directory where the output files will be saved.
    - build_fancy_recaps (Parameter): Whether to build fancy recaps of the results into a single file.
    - build_fancy_plots (Parameter): Whether to build fancy plots of the results into a single file.
    - path_to_xyz_file (Parameter): Path to the XYZ file containing the atomic coordinates.
    - number_of_atoms (Parameter): Number of atoms in the system.
    - number_of_frames (Parameter): Number of frames in the XYZ file.
    - header (Parameter): Number of lines in the header of the XYZ file.
    - range_of_frames (Parameter): Range of frames to be analysed.
    - frames_to_analyse (Parameter): Frames to be analysed.
    - timestep (Parameter): Timestep of the simulation.
    - lbox (Parameter): Box length.
    - temperature (Parameter): Temperature of the system.
    - pressure (Parameter): Pressure of the system.
    - version (Parameter): Version of the software.
    - quiet (Parameter): Whether to print settings or not.
    - overwrite_results (Parameter): Whether to overwrite files by default.
    - print_clusters_positions (Parameter): Whether to print the positions of the clusters.
    - max_size (Parameter): Maximum size of the clusters for the cluster size distribution.
    - supported_extensions (Parameter): List of supported extensions.

Methods:
--------
    - __init__(extension="SiOz"): Initializes a Settings object with default settings.
    - load_default_settings(extension): Loads default settings based on the extension.
    - print_settings(): Prints the current settings.
    - print_all_settings(): Prints all settings, including those not recommended for printing.

modules.name: nexus.main
documentation: internal imports

functions.name: nexus.main.main
documentation:
Analyzes a trajectory based on the provided settings.

Parameters:
-----------
    settings (Settings): An object containing settings for the analysis.

This function performs an analysis on a trajectory based on the provided settings.
It creates necessary directories, counts configurations, imports required modules,
reads lattice properties, sets up cutoffs, and calculates percolation properties
for each frame within the specified range. The analysis includes finding clusters
based on connectivity criteria, calculating cluster sizes, and writing results
to output files.

Returns:
--------
    None

classes.name: nexus.settings.parameter.Parameter

methods.name: nexus.settings.parameter.Parameter.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a Parameter object with a name and value.

Parameters:
-----------
    - name (str) : Name of the parameter.
    - value () : Value associated with the parameter.

methods.name: nexus.settings.parameter.Parameter.get_name
documentation:
Returns the name of the parameter.

Returns:
--------
    - str : Name of the parameter.

methods.name: nexus.settings.parameter.Parameter.get_value
documentation:
Returns the value associated with the parameter.

Returns:
--------
    - value () : Value associated with the Parameter.

methods.name: nexus.settings.parameter.Parameter.set_value
documentation:
Sets a new value for the parameter.

Parameters:
-----------
    - new_value (bool or any): The new value to be set for the parameter.

Raises:
-------
    - ValueError: If the value provided is invalid for the parameter.

Note:
-----
    - If the parameter is 'print_clusters_positions', setting it to True will generate a large amount of data.
      This option is not recommended for large systems. If 'print_clusters_positions' is set to True,
      the user will be prompted to confirm the action.

The Parameter class represents a parameter with a name and a value.

Attributes:
-----------
    - name (str) : Name of the parameter.
    - value () : Value associated with the parameter.

Methods:
--------
    - __init__(self, name, value) : Initializes a Parameter object with a name and value.
    - get_name(self) : Returns the name of the parameter.
    - get_value(self) : Returns the value associated with the parameter.
    - set_value(self, new_value) : Sets a new value for the parameter.

Inherits from Parameter.

    - set_cluster_parameter(key, new_value) : Replaces a value of the settings.

methods.name: nexus.io.result.CorrelationLength.add_to_timeline
documentation: Appends a data point to the timeline.

methods.name: nexus.io.result.CorrelationLength.calculate_correlation_length
documentation:
Calculates the gyration radius distribution based on the timeline data.

Mathematically, the correlation length is defined as:
$\(\xi = \sqrt{\frac{2 \sum_{i=1}^{N} r_{i}^{2} s_{i}^{2}}{\sum_{i=1}^{N} s_{i}^{2}}}$\) where:
    - \(r_{i}\) is the radius of the cluster \(i\),
    - \(s_{i}\) is the size of the cluster \(i\),
    - \(N\) is the number of clusters.

documentation:
Add a neighbour to the list of neighbours of the Atom.

Parameters:
-----------

Returns:
--------
    - None.
____________NEIGHBOURS METHODS____________

methods.name: nexus.core.atom.Atom.filter_neighbours
documentation:
Removes the neighbours that are not within the cutoff distances (depending of pair of atoms).

Parameters:
-----------
    - distances (list): List of distances to the neighbours.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.atom.Atom.set_cluster
documentation:
Set the cluster if and type that the atom belong to.

Parameters:
-----------
    - cluster_id (int) : cluster index to be set.
    - cluster_type (str) : cluster type to be set. 

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.atom.Atom.reset_cluster
documentation:
Reset the cluster(s) of the atom.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

Represents an atom within a system.

Attributes:
-----------
    - element (str) : Atomic element.
    - id (int) : Identifier of the atom in the system.
    - position (np.array) : XYZ coordinates.
    - frame (int) : Frame index in the trajectory.
    - cutoffs (dict) : Cutoff distances dictionary (Cutoff object).
    - extension (str) : Extension used for method determination.
    - atomic_mass (float) : Atomic mass of the atom.
    - neighbours (list) : List of first neighbours (PBC applied).
    - coordination (int) : Number of neighbours around the atom (PBC applied).
    - parent (Atom) : Root of the cluster.
    - cluster_id (int) : Cluster index to which the atom belongs.
    - cluster_type (str) : Cluster type to which the atom belongs.

Methods:
--------
    - __init__ : Initializes an Atom object.
    - get_element : Returns the element of the Atom.
    - get_id : Returns the unique identifier of the Atom.
    - get_position : Returns the spatial coordinates of the Atom.
    - get_frame : Returns the frame index associated with the Atom.
    - get_neighbours : Returns the list of neighbours of the Atom.
    - get_atomic_mass : Returns the atomic mass of the Atom.
    - get_coordination : Returns the coordination number of the Atom.
    - get_cluster_id : Returns the cluster id that the atom belongs to.
    - add_neighbour : Adds a neighbour to the list of neighbours of the Atom.
    - add_direct_neighbour : Adds a neighbour to the list of direct neighbours of the Atom.
    - filter_neighbours : Removes neighbours not within cutoff distances (depending on pair of atoms).
    - set_cluster : Sets the cluster and type that the atom belongs to.
    - reset_cluster : Resets the cluster(s) of the atom.

    - values (list): List of cutoff values.

Methods:
    - __init__: Initializes a Cutoff object.
    - get_cutoff: Returns the cutoff for the pair of elements.
    - get_max_cutoff: Returns the maximum cutoff in the system.

functions.name: nexus.utils.print_title.print_title
documentation:
Prints the title and the version of the package.

Returns:
--------
  - None.

modules.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz
documentation: This file contains all the methods / functions that are specific to SiOz-SiOz clusters.

functions.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz.transform_into_subclass
documentation: Return a Silicon object or Oxygen object from the subclass Silicon or Oxygen whether the atom.element is 'Si' or 'O'.

functions.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz.get_default_settings
documentation: Method that load the default parameters for extension SiOz.

functions.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz.calculate_concentrations
documentation:
Calculate the following properties.

Returns:
--------
    - SiO4      : list of SiO4 tetrahedra
    - SiO5      : list of SiO5 pentahedra
    - SiO6      : list of SiO6 octahedra
    - SiO7      : list of SiO7 heptahedra 
    - OSi1      : list of OSi1
    - OSi2      : list of OSi2
    - OSi3      : list of OSi3
    - OSi4      : list of OSi4
    - ES_SiO6   : proportion of edge-sharing in SiO6 units

functions.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz.find_extra_clusters
documentation:
Find stishovite clusters, ie SiO6-SiO6 connected through two edge-sharings.

Parameters:
-----------
    - atoms (list) : List of Atom objects (ie SiO6 with two edge-sharings units)
    - criteria : str, "bond" or "distance"
    - counter_c : int, counter for the cluster id
    - settings : Settings object

Returns:
--------
    - local_clusters (list) : List of stishovite clusters (Cluster objects)
    - counter_c (int) : updated counter for the cluster id

methods.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz.Silicon.get_number_of_edges
documentation: Return the number of edges sharing

methods.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz.Silicon.calculate_coordination
documentation: Calculate the coordination number of the atom (ie the number of first neighbours) for the extension SiOz

methods.name: nexus.extensions.SiOz.Oxygen.calculate_coordination
documentation: Calculate the coordination number of the atom (ie the number of first neighbours) for the extension SiOz

modules.name: nexus.core.cluster

classes.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a Cluster object.

Parameters:
-----------
    - atoms (list) : List of Atom objects belonging to the cluster.
    - box (Box) : Box object representing the simulation box.
    - connectivity (str) : Connectivity of the cluster.
    - root_id (int) : Atom id that is the root of the cluster.
    - frame (int) : Frame of the trajectory.
    - size (int) : Size of the cluster (number of atoms).

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.add_atom
documentation:
Add an atom to the cluster.

Parameters:
-----------
    - atom (Atom) : Atom object to be added to the cluster

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.get_atoms
documentation:
Return the list of Atom objects belonging to the cluster

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.set_indices_and_positions
documentation:
Set the array of all unique indices of Atom objects in the cluster.

Parameters:
--------
    - positions_dict (dict) : Dictionary where keys are the index of the Atoms and values, their unwrapped positions.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.calculate_center_of_mass
documentation:
Calculate the center of mass of the cluser

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.write_coordinates
documentation:
Write the cluster coordinates to an XYZ file.

Parameters:
-----------
    - path_to_directory (str): Path to the directory where the XYZ file will be saved.

Returns:
--------

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.calculate_gyration_radius
documentation:
Calculate the gyration radius of the cluster.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.calculate_percolation_probability
documentation:
Calculate the percolation probability of the cluster.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.calculate_order_parameter
documentation:
Calculate the order parameter of the cluster.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.calculate_unwrapped_positions
documentation:
Calculate the unwrapped positions of the atoms in the cluster to make it continuous.

Parameters:
--------
    - criteria (str) : Criteria to find the clusters ("bond" or "distance").
    - chain (list) : List of the successive elements forming the clusters.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.cluster.Cluster.unwrap_position
documentation:
Unwraps position considering periodic boundary conditions.

Parameters:
----------
- vector (list) : Vector defined the difference of the composants of the vectors position of an atom and its nearest neighbour in the cluster.
- box_size (list) : Dimensions of the periodic box in 3D space.

Returns:
----------
- Unwrapped position as a tuple.

Represents a cluster of atoms within a system.

Attributes: #TODO: update the attributes
-----------
    - atoms (list) : List of Atom objects belonging to the cluster.
    - box (Box) : Box object representing the simulation box.
    - connectivity (str) : Connectivity of the cluster.
    - root_id (int) : Atom id that is the root of the cluster.
    - frame (int) : Frame of the trajectory.
    - size (int) : Size of the cluster (number of atoms).
    - center_of_mass (list) : Center of mass of the cluster.
    - indices (list) : List of indices of the atoms.
    - unwrapped_positions (list) : List of unwrapped positions of the cluster.
    - percolation_probability (str) : Percolation probability.
    - gyration_radius (float) : Gyration radius of the cluster.

Methods:
--------
    - __init__ : Initializes a Cluster object.
    - add_atom : Adds an atom to the cluster.
    - get_atoms : Returns the list of Atom objects belonging to the cluster.
    - set_indices_and_positions : Sets the array of unique indices and positions of atoms in the cluster.
    - calculate_center_of_mass : Calculates the center of mass of the cluster.
    - write_coordinates : Writes the cluster coordinates to an XYZ file.
    - calculate_gyration_radius : Calculates the gyration radius of the cluster.
    - calculate_percolation_probability : Calculates the percolation probability of the cluster.
    - calculate_unwrapped_positions : Calculates the unwrapped positions of atoms in the cluster.
    - unwrap_position : Unwraps position considering periodic boundary conditions.

modules.name: nexus.core.system

classes.name: nexus.core.system.System

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a System object.

Parameters:
-----------
    - settings (Settings): Settings object containing the list of all the parameters.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.add_atom
documentation:
Add an Atom object to the list of atoms.

Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.add_cluster
documentation:
Add a Cluster object to the list of clusters.

--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.get_positions
documentation:
Return the list of positions and elements of all Atom objects.

--------
    - tuple : the filtered position in a np.array and their associated elements in a np.array.

documentation:
Return the list of positions of all Atom objects of the same element.

Return the list of Atom objects belonging to the same species.

Return the uniques elements present in the system along with their counts.

Reset the cluster indexes for all Atom objects in the system.

    - None.

Wrap atomic positions inside the simulation box using the periodic boundary conditions.

--------
    - None.

Return the mass of the system in atomic unit.

documentation:
Calculate the nearest neighbours of all the atom in the system.        
- NOTE: this method is extension dependant.

--------
    - None.

Determine the structural units and other structural properties.

-----------

--------

Set the concentrations of the structural units.

--------

Return the concentration of the sites for a given connectivity.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.get_all_clusters
documentation:
Return the list of all Cluster objects associated with the given connectivity.

-----------

Returns:
--------

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.get_filtered_clusters
documentation:
Return the list of Cluster objects associated with the given connectivity.
This method excluds clusters of size 1 and percolating (1D, 2D or 3D) clusters.

Parameters:
-----------
    - connectivity (str) : Connectivity of the cluster.
    
Returns:
--------
    - list : List of the clusters associated with the given connectivity.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.get_all_cluster_sizes
documentation:
Return the list of cluster size associated with the given connectivity.
This method excluds clusters of size 1.

Parameters:
-----------
    - connectivity (str) : Connectivity of the cluster.
    
Returns:
--------
    - list : List of the clusters associated with the given connectivity.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.get_cluster_sizes_distribution
documentation:
Return the cluster size distribution of the clusters associated with the given connectivity.

Parameters:
-----------
    - connectivity (str) : Connectivity of the cluster.
    
Returns:
--------
    - dict : Dict of the cluster size distribution, where keys are the size of the clusters associated with the given connectivity.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.get_gyration_radius_distribution
documentation:
Return the gyration radius distribution of the clusters associated with the given connectivity.

Parameters:
-----------
    - list_sizes (list) : List of the cluster sizes.
    
Returns:
--------
    - dict : Dict of the gyration radius distribution, where keys are the size of the clusters associated with the given connectivity.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.calculate_order_parameter
documentation:
Calculate the order parameter of the percolating cluster.

Parameters:
-----------
    - connectivity (str) : Connectivity of the cluster.

Returns:
--------
    - list : Order parameter of the percolating cluster [1d value, 2d value, 3d value].

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.calculate_percolation_probability
documentation:
Calculate the percolation probability of the percolating cluster.

Parameters:
-----------
    - connectivity (str) : Connectivity of the cluster.
    
Returns:
    - list : Percolation probability of the percolating cluster [1d value, 2d value, 3d value].

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.write_coordinates_all_in_one
documentation:
Write the cluster coordinates to an XYZ file and a list.txt file with their paths.

Parameters:
-----------
    - path_to_directory (str): Path to the directory where the XYZ file will be saved.
    
Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.decrypt_connectivity
documentation:
Decrypt the connectivity string to get the atomic species and the number of neighbors.

Parameters:
----------
    - connectivity (str): The connectivity string to decrypt.

Returns:
----------
    - tuple: Tuple containing the atomic species and the number of neighbors.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.find
documentation:
Find the root of the cluster to which the given atom belongs.

Parameters:
-----------
    - atom (Atom): Atom object for which to find the root.

Returns:
--------
    - root (Atom): Root Atom object of the cluster

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.union
documentation:
Union the two clusters to which the given atoms belong.

Parameters:
-----------
    - atom_1 (Atom): First Atom object.
    - atom_2 (Atom): Second Atom object
    
Returns:
--------
    - None.

methods.name: nexus.core.system.System.find_clusters
documentation:
Find clusters based on specified criteria.

Parameters:
----------
- connectivity (str): The connectivity type for which to find the clusters. (e.g "SiO5-SiO5" in the case of SiO2)

Returns:
--------
    - None.

Represents a system of atoms and provides methods for analyzing and manipulating the system.

Attributes:
-----------
    - settings (Settings): Settings object containing the list of all the parameters.
    - atoms (list): List of all the atoms in the system.
    - box (Box): The Box object containing the lattice information at each frame.
    - clusters (list): List of all the clusters of the system.
    - counter_c (int): Counter of Cluster object.
    - frame (int): Frame of the system in the trajectory.
    - cutoffs (Cutoff): Cutoff object managing cutoff distances for pairs of elements.

Methods:
--------
    - __init__: Initializes a System object.
    - add_atom: Adds an Atom object to the list of atoms.
    - add_cluster: Adds a Cluster object to the list of clusters.
    - get_atoms: Returns the list of atoms.
    - get_positions: Returns the list of positions and elements of all Atom objects.
    - get_positions_by_element: Returns the list of positions of all Atom objects of the same element.
    - get_atoms_by_element: Returns the list of Atom objects belonging to the same species.
    - get_unique_element: Returns the unique elements present in the system along with their counts.
    - reset_cluster_indexes: Resets the cluster indexes for all Atom objects in the system.
    - wrap_atomic_positions: Wraps atomic positions inside the simulation box using periodic boundary conditions.
    - compute_mass: Returns the mass of the system in atomic unit.
    - calculate_neighbours: Calculates the nearest neighbours of all atoms in the system.
    - calculate_structural_units: Determines the structural units and other structural properties.
    - get_all_clusters: Returns the list of all Cluster objects associated with the given connectivity.
    - get_filtered_clusters: Returns the list of Cluster objects associated with the given connectivity.
    - get_all_cluster_sizes: Returns the list of cluster sizes associated with the given connectivity.
    - get_filtered_cluster_sizes: Returns the list of cluster sizes associated with the given connectivity.
    - write_coordinates_all_in_one: Writes the cluster coordinates to an XYZ file.
    - decrypt_connectivity: Decrypts the connectivity string to get the atomic species and the number of neighbors.
    - find: Finds the root of the cluster to which the given atom belongs.
    - union: Unions the two clusters to which the given atoms belong.
    - find_clusters: Finds clusters based on specified criteria.
